飞艇规则飞艇和值推荐【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239120200_65524698<br>vk.com/topic-239110171_66118100<br>vk.com/topic-239199664_64462587<br>vk.com/topic-239095537_65903783<br>vk.com/topic-239061453_64628686<br>vk.com/topic-239153610_65524699<br>vk.com/topic-239048396_64781891<br>vk.com/topic-239066392_65067274<br>vk.com/topic-239194178_64968832<br>vk.com/topic-239183460_65524701<br>vk.com/topic-239142250_65524704<br>vk.com/topic-239183390_65524706<br>vk.com/topic-239183369_65248099<br>vk.com/topic-239191756_64781894<br>vk.com/topic-239183287_65903787<br>vk.com/topic-239183392_65067276<br>vk.com/topic-239142213_64628688<br>vk.com/topic-239183304_64462593<br>vk.com/topic-239149202_65067277<br>vk.com/topic-239100482_65067280<br>vk.com/topic-239205219_65248104<br>vk.com/topic-239110170_65524711<br>vk.com/topic-239149285_64373622<br>vk.com/topic-239153685_64373619<br>vk.com/topic-239061402_65067281<br>vk.com/topic-239066396_64781901<br>vk.com/topic-239149198_64968870<br>vk.com/topic-239183347_65903790<br>vk.com/topic-239153661_66118109<br>vk.com/topic-239170342_65067284<br>vk.com/topic-239183220_65524718<br>vk.com/topic-239153616_64781859<br>vk.com/topic-239079440_65524720<br>vk.com/to
